title: 01458_BEATs_Audio_Pre-Training_with_Acoustic_Tokenizers
positive_examples: Achieves state-of-the-art results across various audio classification benchmarks, improving audio understanding capabilities.
Facilitates future work of audio pre-training and multi-modality pre-training, potentially benefiting various applications in audio processing.
negative_examples: The iterative pre-training process results in a linear increase in computational overhead, which could limit accessibility for some researchers.
Relies solely on the AudioSet-2M dataset for pre-training, which is limited in terms of audio and speech coverage, potentially leading to biases in model performance.
